The Global Coupon Exchange Protocol — Est. 2015
Est. 2015 · Hong Kong · Global Protocol

Built to Connect Supply & Demand

About the Company

Mezzofy is the AI-powered clearinghouse standardizing digital coupons into secure, tokenized assets — connecting merchants and distributors worldwide through the Global Coupon Exchange Protocol.
